underlying_goal: Run a patrol routine: execute heartbeat check, check for hooks, and create/execute a patrol wisp if no hook exists, as part of a Gas Town daemon system
friction_detail: Dolt database corruption (missing repo_state.json, empty journal files) blocked the patrol routine from executing, and Claude spent the entire session attempting repair before the user interrupted.
brief_summary: User asked Deacon to run a patrol routine involving heartbeat and hook checks, but Dolt database corruption prevented any progress and the user interrupted during repair attempts.
